title: Turkish Sausage Pide
description: A twist on traditional Turkish pide, featuring roasted sausage and crispy crust.

ingredients.name: Springy Greens
ingredients.notes: such as spinach or kale, chopped

instructions: Roll out pide dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Spread roasted garlic evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border.
Arrange sausage slices on top of garlic, slightly overlapping.
Brush crust with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Fold crust edges over the filling to form a seal.
Transfer pide to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until crust is golden brown and filling is cooked through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with springy greens on the side.
